ast.name: error
ast.target: 维基百科抓取/插入错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum number of main section headers an article must have to be considered suitable. Articles with fewer headers will be skipped.
ast.target: 文章必须包含的最少主章节标题数量。标题少于此数量的文章将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of attempts to find a suitable article before giving up. Increase for more perseverance, decrease to fail faster.
ast.target: 放弃前尝试查找合适文章的最大次数。增加此值以提高坚持度，减少此值以更快失败。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of section titles to exclude from the generated notes (case-insensitive).
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的章节标题列表，这些标题将从生成的笔记中排除（不区分大小写）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify a folder where new Wikipedia notes will be saved (e.g., "Wikipedia/Articles" or leave empty for vault root). The folder will be created if it does not exist.
ast.target: 指定保存新维基百科笔记的文件夹（例如 \"Wikipedia/Articles\" 或留空表示库根目录）。如果文件夹不存在，将自动创建。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g., See also, References, External links
ast.target: 例如 另请参阅, 参考文献, 外部链接

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在获取维基百科文章...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到合适的维基百科文章。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch/insert Wikipedia article. See console.
ast.target: 获取/插入维基百科文章失败。请查看控制台。
